s1: I like wild, uninhibited parties.
s2: I prefer quiet parties with good conversation.

s1: There are some movies I enjoy seeing a second or even a third time.
s2: I can't stand watching a movie that I've seen before.

s1: I often wish I could be a mountain climber
s2: I can't understand people who risk their necks climbing mountains.

s1: I dislike all body odors.
s2: I like some earthly body smells.

s1: I get bored seeing the same old faces.
s2: I like the comfort and familiarity of everyday friends.

s1: I like to explore a strange city or section of town by myself, even if it means getting lost.
s2: I prefer a guide when I am in a place I don't know well.

s1: I dislike people who do or say things just to shock or upset others
s2: When you can predict almost everything a person will do and say, he or she must be boring.

s1: I usually don't enjoy a movie or play when I can predict what will happen in advance.
s2: I don't mind watching a movie or a play when I can predict what will happen in advance.

s1: I have tried marijuana for fun or would like to.
s2: I would never smoke marijuana for fun.

s1: I would not like to try any drug that might produce strange effects in me.
s2: I would like to try drugs that produce hallucinations.

s1: A sensible person avoids activities that are dangerous.
s2: I sometimes like to do things that are a little frightening.

s1: I dislike people who are uninhibited about sex.
s2: I don't mind people who are uninhibited about sex.

s1: I find that stimulants make me uncomfortable.
s2: I often like to get high (drinking alcohol or smoking marijuana).

s1: I like to try new foods that I have never tasted before.
s2: I order foods with which I am familiar, so as to avoid disappointment and unpleasantness.

s1: I enjoy looking at personal videos or travel photos.
s2: Looking at someone's personal videos or travel photos bores me tremendously.

s1: I would like to take up water skiing.
s2: I would not like to take up water skiing.

s1: I would like to try surfing.
s2: I would not like to try surfing.

s1: I would like to take off on a trip with no preplanned or definite routes or timetable.
s2: When I go on a trip, I like to plan my route and timetable fairly carefully.

s1: I prefer the “down to earth” kinds of people as friends.
s2: I would like to make friends who are unconventional.

s1: I would not like to learn to fly an airplane.
s2: I would like to learn to fly an airplane.

s1: I prefer the surface of the water rather than being under water.
s2: I would like to go scuba diving.

s1: I don't mind meeting people who are homosexuals.
s2: I feel uncomfortable meeting homosexuals.

s1: I would like to try skydiving.
s2: I would never want to try jumping out of a plane, with or without a parachute.

s1: I prefer friends who are excitingly unpredictable.
s2: I prefer friends who are reliable and predictable.

s1: I am not interested in experience for its own sake.
s2: I like to have new and exciting experiences and sensations, even if they are a little frightening, unconventional, or illegal.

s1: The essence of good art is in its clarity, symmetry of form and harmony of colors.
s2: I often find beauty in the clashing colors and irregular forms of modern paintings.

s1: I enjoy spending time in the familiar surroundings of home.
s2: I get very restless if I have to stay home for any length of time.

s1: I like to dive off the high dive board.
s2: I don't like the feeling I get standing on the high dive board (or I don't go near it at all).

s1: I am attracted to people who are physically exciting.
s2: I like to date people who share my values.

s1: Heavy drinking usually ruins a party because some people get loud and boisterous.
s2: Keeping drinks full is the key to a good party.

s1: The worst social sin is to be rude.
s2: The worst social sin is to be a bore.

s1: A person should have considerable sexual experience before marriage.
s2: It's better if two married persons begin their sexual experience with each other.

s1: Even if I had the money, I would not care to associate with other wealthy people.
s2: I would love to live the lifestyle of the super-wealthy.

s1: I like people who are sharp and witty, even if they do sometimes insult others.
s2: I dislike people who have their fun at the expense of hurting the feelings of others.

s1: There is altogether too much portrayal of sex in movies.
s2: I enjoy watching many of the sexy scenes in movies.

s1: I feel best after having a couple of drinks.
s2: Something is wrong with people who need alcohol to feel good.

s1: People should dress according to some standard of taste, neatness, and style.
s2: People should dress in individual ways even if the effects are sometimes strange.

s1: Sailing long distances in small sailing crafts is foolhardy.
s2: I would like to sail a long distance in a small but seaworthy sailing craft.

s1: I have no patience with dull or boring people.
s2: I find something interesting in almost every person I talk to.

s1: Skiing down a high mountain slope is a good way to end up on crutches.
s2: I think I would enjoy the sensations of skiing very fast down a high mountain slope.
